title: Strategy context brief: starter trace demo
context_summary: The starter workspace should make ProductOS strategy visible before a new team edits deeper discovery or delivery artifacts.

enterprise_goal_links.linkage_summary: A clearer strategy layer should help new teams understand why the seeded workspace exists.
enterprise_goal_links.success_signal: More teams retain the seeded strategy and discovery flow long enough to adapt it.

portfolio_bets.rationale: The starter should show one coherent strategic bet instead of looking like a blank template dump.

business_model_outcomes.linkage_summary: A strategy-aware starter should reduce confusion and increase trust in the ProductOS operating model.

strategic_constraints.constraint: Keep the starter adaptable for real teams.
strategic_constraints.consequence: The seeded strategy should demonstrate the model without locking teams into one market or workflow forever.

evidence_refs.justification: The starter mission explains why a strategy-aware demo bundle is needed.
